description: A screenshot of a mobile news site. A black header bar carries the CBS 12 NEWS logo with a menu icon, a cloud weather icon reading 74 degrees, and a WATCH button. Below, a bold black serif headline on a white background reads Undocumented immigrant accused of killing mother with hammer at Florida gas station.
notable_text: 12 NEWS; Undocumented immigrant accused of killing mother with hammer at Florida gas station
